untranslatable_reason: Signal requires market microstructure mechanics (quote placement, refresh intervals, time precedence, quote withdrawal) that are not expressible as technical price/volume indicators. Requires order book state (bid-ask quotes, order timestamps, time priority) and order management logic not available in OHLCV-based indicator set. Parameters like 'quote_refresh_interval_seconds' and 'minimum_price_improvement_required_bps' relate to order submission/management, not to price levels or volume thresholds that can be backtested with available indicators.
translation_notes: This is a high-frequency market-making/quote-refreshing strategy from oral auction market microstructure. It cannot be translated to a retrospective OHLCV backtest engine. Would require access to: (1) Order book depth and bid-ask quotes at sub-second frequency, (2) Individual order timestamps and priority queue positioning, (3) Order submission/cancellation events, (4) Latency and message queue data. Recommend implementing as a live trading rule or using an order-book simulator instead.
